inputs.label: Number of Dice
inputs.businessContext: Total dice used in the game (standard Yahtzee uses 5).

inputs.label: Target Matching Dice
inputs.businessContext: Number of dice that must show the same value (e.g., 5 for a Yahtzee).

inputs.label: Current Matching Dice
inputs.businessContext: Number of dice already showing the desired value from previous rolls.

formulas.probability: currentMatches >= targetMatches ? 1 : (currentMatches === 0 ? (6 * Math.pow(1/6, diceCount)) : Math.pow(1/6, diceCount - currentMatches))
